running_headers_to_strip: AUTOBIOGRAPHY OF MARGARET M. W. DeWITT
files.notes: This file contains three distinct pieces: Caroline Farr's autobiography (the main article), a short poem about quilts, and Margaret De Witt's autobiography. The boundaries are clearly marked by titles and author attributions. The file ends with an editor's note from Eunice I. Gardner about Margaret De Witt.
